name: @cfp/gex
description: GEX data pipeline — Heatseeker SSE poller + scheduled briefs + intraday alerts. Migrated from the standalone gexester-vexster repo (now archived).

scripts.scan: D=$(date +%Y-%m-%d) && node scanner/scripts/scan-day.js --date=$D && node scanner/scripts/refine-picks.js --date=$D --top=10 && node scanner/scripts/daily-report.js --date=$D --discord
